seo.title: Top 40 Kubernetes Interview Questions 2026 | K8s Engineer Prep
seo.description: Master the top 40 Kubernetes interview questions for 2026. Covers pods, deployments, services, networking, RBAC, Helm, and Kubernetes architecture.
seo.keywords: kubernetes interview questions 2026, K8s interview, kubectl interview, CKA interview prep, kubernetes networking interview

hero.title: Kubernetes Interview Questions 2026
hero.description: Essential Kubernetes interview preparation for DevOps engineers and platform engineers. Covers K8s architecture, workloads, networking, security, and Helm.

topTips: The CKA exam is practical — practice kubectl commands until they're muscle memory.
Understand Pod lifecycle states: Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed, Unknown, CrashLoopBackOff.
Know how to debug: kubectl describe pod, kubectl logs, kubectl exec -it, kubectl get events.
Understand Service types: ClusterIP (internal), NodePort (expose on node), LoadBalancer (cloud LB), ExternalName (DNS alias).
Practice HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) configuration — scaling based on CPU/custom metrics is commonly asked.
